programme.title: Hollywood Medium With Tyler Henry
programme.desc: Snooki makes a sentimental connection with her cherished uncle who passed; Monica Potter receives a life-altering message from her departed father; Tyler helps Tom Arnold to establish a connection to his deceased family members so he can move on.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing: LA
programme.desc: Josh and Heather prepare to say their wedding vows in Aspen but first face off in a tense negotiation that could keep them from walking down the aisle.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Plaintiff claims she is being overcharged and taken advantage of by an crooked landlord while searching for a home for her disabled daughter. However, the landlord contends that the plaintiff was a hi.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A daughter refuses to pay her mother back on a cash loan or return an I-phone she's paying for. But the defendant claims she doesn't owe her mother one red penny!

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing: New York
programme.desc: Fredrik lands an entire building from one of New York City's most prolific developers, but there’s just one catch - the project is still under construction and he’s trying to sell the units before they reach completion. Ryan picks up a listing in Gramercy Park and hopes to prove that his youth and energy will be a good fit in this old and conservative neighborhood. Michael makes the fateful call that will determine if he sells $30 million worth of apartments in Trevor’s building or if he ends up with nothing.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Emma Grede, the CEO and co-founder of fashion juggernaut Good American, founding partner of SKIMS and co-founder of Safely, returns to the Tank. First into the Tank are best friends from Dana Point, C.

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: A fitness enthusiast and nasal spray addict wants Paul to fix her nose, and the doctors meet the world's most identical twins.

programme.title: Below Deck Down Under
programme.desc: A deckhand is forced to own up to their mistake. Jason pushes Lara out of her managerial comfort zone. Tzarina struggles to find resolve with Lara. Alesia gets frustrated with Tzarina. The crew goes o.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: All hell breaks loose at choir auditions when Jen confronts Angie H. Hoping to rise above the drama, Lisa recommits to her faith. Whitney talks to Heather about the distance in their friendship, creat.

programme.title: Botched: Plastic Surgery Rewind
programme.desc: With only a few days left of the Rewind Retreat, both Jessica and Sophia must make a decision. The doctors question if Aubrey is mentally prepared for her rewind surgery. The ladies enjoy a much-needed pool party to let their hair down but, as always at the Rewind Retreat, there’s a twist.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac
programme.desc: The season nine reunion begins with a surprise as the ladies learn that the Grande Dame will not be in attendance, but not completely absent either. Wendy expresses her disappointment with Karen's lac.

programme.title: Hollywood Medium With Tyler Henry
programme.sub-title: Nicole Snooki Polizzi, Monica Potter & Tom Arnold
programme.desc: Snooki makes an emotional connection with her beloved late uncle.

programme.desc: The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: $4,000 in unpaid rent amongst best friends come to court. When their friendship took a turn for the worse, the defendant abandoned the plaintiff leaving her financially responsible for the rent and da.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing: LA
programme.desc: Madison goes up against David and James for a modern Malibu compound, but when the owner toys with the idea of teaming them all up.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Sutton and Crystal lay all their lingering issues out on the table. The group is forced into quarantine and Lisa uses her time at home to dig up hidden treasures for her daughters.

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show
programme.desc: Kelly Clarkson presents the biggest newsmakers and names in film, television and music; as well as emerging new talent and everyday people who are beacons of hope in their communities.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing: LA
programme.desc: Madison goes up against David and James for a modern Malibu compound, but when the owner toys with the idea of teaming them all up.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

programme.title: Hollywood Medium With Tyler Henry
programme.sub-title: Mel B, Reza Farahan, Jana Kramer, Tionne 'T-Boz' Watkins
programme.desc: Mel B has a tearful reading as Tyler connects her to a beloved patriarch.

programme.title: Judge Rinder
programme.desc: Arbitration show in which real small-claims cases are adjudicated over within a studio courtroom by Judge Robert Rinder.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Sutton and Crystal lay all their lingering issues out on the table. The group is forced into quarantine and Lisa uses her time at home to dig up hidden treasures for her daughters.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Former business partners embattled in a legal dispute. The plaintiff claims his ex-partner's lazy work ethic caused the business to flounder and is suing the defendant for $5,000 for breach of contrac.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Kyle opens her home in La Quinta to the group for a desert getaway, but Erika cannot escape the fallout from her messy divorce.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing: LA
programme.desc: Josh Flagg whisks boyfriend Bobby off to Paris to propose. Josh Altman takes on a listing with an unpredictable homeowner.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Guest shark Emma Grede; a line of functional apparel and accessories; a healthy superfood product; a way to store jewelry when on the go.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: The Ohana crew is very unhappy to learn Adrienne will be coming onboard as a guest, and when she blows the lid off the lingering tension between Kat and Amy, the boat erupts in total chaos.

programme.title: Killer Grannies
programme.desc: A beloved chef and cooking instructor is found shot to death at work, and investigators are left baffled. But when a loved one's strange behavior draws their attention, detectives discover the killer.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: NYPD detectives are on the hunt for the killer who tortured and executed a beloved New York City public school teacher.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Firefighters battling a vehicle fire are horrified to discover a man's charred body at the base of the flames, and the ensuing investigation reveals a sinister murder plot that few in the small Texas.

programme.title: Deadly Waters with Captain Lee
programme.desc: In the wake of a violent storm, a Rhode Island harbormaster finds a badly decomposed body aboard a sailboat. Now, detectives must uncover the truth: Was the killer Mother Nature or a more nefarious fo.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: The Ohana crew is very unhappy to learn Adrienne will be coming onboard as a guest, and when she blows the lid off the lingering tension between Kat and Amy, the boat erupts in total chaos.

programme.title: Killer Grannies
programme.desc: A beloved chef and cooking instructor is found shot to death at work, and investigators are left baffled. But when a loved one's strange behavior draws their attention, detectives discover the killer.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: NYPD detectives are on the hunt for the killer who tortured and executed a beloved New York City public school teacher.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Firefighters battling a vehicle fire are horrified to discover a man's charred body at the base of the flames, and the ensuing investigation reveals a sinister murder plot that few in the small Texas.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Kyle opens her home in La Quinta to the group for a desert getaway, but Erika cannot escape the fallout from her messy divorce. When Lisa questions certain new reports in the media, Dorit offers insights from her own experience. Sutton and Crystal connect with Erika through stories of family loss. Meanwhile, Kathy heats things up in the kitchen - and, with a little help from her friends, cools down in front of a fan.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Former business partners embattled in a legal dispute. The plaintiff claims his ex-partner's lazy work ethic caused the business to flounder and is suing the defendant for $5,000 for breach of contrac.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing: LA
programme.desc: Josh Flagg whisks boyfriend Bobby off to Paris to propose. Josh Altman takes on a listing with an unpredictable homeowner.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Guest shark Emma Grede; a line of functional apparel and accessories; a healthy superfood product; a way to store jewelry when on the go.

programme.desc: Kyle opens her home in La Quinta to the group for a desert getaway, but Erika cannot escape the fallout from her messy divorce.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: The Ohana crew is very unhappy to learn Adrienne will be coming onboard as a guest, and when she blows the lid off the lingering tension between Kat and Amy, the boat erupts in total chaos. Kelley and Jennice's awkward tension is becoming noticeable to their crewmates and Amy feels isolated when Kat and Kate turn against her.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Firefighters battling a vehicle fire are horrified to discover a man's charred body at the base of the flames, and the ensuing investigation reveals a sinister murder plot that few in the small Texas.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Kyle opens her home in La Quinta to the group for a desert getaway, but Erika cannot escape the fallout from her messy divorce. When Lisa questions certain new reports in the media, Dorit offers insights from her own experience. Sutton and Crystal connect with Erika through stories of family loss. Meanwhile, Kathy heats things up in the kitchen - and, with a little help from her friends, cools down in front of a fan.
